task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: The regex must correctly capture timestamp in ISO 8601 format, log level (INFO, ERROR, WARN, DEBUG), and the remaining message text from a standard CloudWatch log line

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, no consecutive hyphens)
solution_criteria: Function must validate bucket name length, character restrictions, and hyphen placement according to AWS S3 naming rules

task: Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket
solution_criteria: JSON must include proper IAM policy structure with correct Action statements (s3:GetObject, s3:ListBucket), Resource ARNs, and Effect set to Allow
